audit_method: ripgrep: INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and conn.execute/connection().execute outside vox-db/src/store (spot-checked); excludes vox-db/tests, codegen string literals, non-SQL .execute APIs.
policy: Business writes SHOULD use VoxDb methods in vox-db/src/store/ops_*.rs. Admin/diagnostic SQL may stay in vox-cli db with explicit scope. vox-db modules outside store/ are internal debt to fold into ops or document as exceptions.

outside_vox_db_crates.summary: reset(): DROP TABLE per sqlite_master; vacuum(): VACUUM; prune(): DELETE FROM agent_memory
outside_vox_db_crates.remediation: Optional: route prune through VoxDb::ops_memory (or dedicated store method); reset/vacuum are admin tools — document as allowed or gate behind ops module.
Move to vox_db::store::ops_ludus (e.g. finalize_battle) — duplicate concern with ops_ludus battle updates.

outside_vox_db_crates.summary: Many direct connection().execute INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on gamify_* tables (historical path parallel to ops_ludus).
outside_vox_db_crates.remediation: Consolidate onto VoxDb / ops_ludus public APIs; delete parallel SQL in vox-ludus once parity tests pass.

outside_vox_db_crates.summary: INSERT ... ON CONFLICT for daily counters and event config overrides
outside_vox_db_crates.remediation: Delegate to ops_ludus or shared helper inside vox-db store.

outside_vox_db_crates.summary: INSERT ... ON CONFLICT for combo-driven daily counter
outside_vox_db_crates.remediation: Use same API as db_ext::increment_daily_counter via VoxDb.

outside_vox_db_crates.summary: INSERT INTO chat_transcripts for user+assistant turns on MCP chat path
outside_vox_db_crates.remediation: Add VoxDb method (e.g. ops_codex or chat-specific ops) and call from MCP.

vox_db_outside_store_modules.summary: Direct executes on chat/usage schema — candidate to merge into store ops or dedicated ops_chat.rs
Generic collection SQL — intentional schemaless path; tighten allowlist per SSOT plan
One-shot migrations / cutover — operational not app CRUD
VoxDb core: transaction, migration apply, test helpers

read_only_or_non_business.note: Generated Rust source strings only, not runtime SQL
